No replicas. No bait-and-switch. Every garment that comes through Shopped By Thread is hand-checked, photographed in-house, and graded on the same scale you'd find at any auction. Brand new, VNDS, used — we tell you exactly what you're buying, every time.

Hellstar

Records Vol. III Hoodie

$385 Brand New / Tagged
Select size Size guide

From the third volume of Hellstar's seminal Records series. Heavyweight French terry construction, oversized box fit, with the signature dual-print graphic on chest and back. Authenticated and graded by Shopped By Thread.

Every Shopped By Thread piece is hand-checked against verified references. Tags, stitching, hardware, and material composition are all examined before listing. This piece comes with our authenticity guarantee.
Item is brand new with original tags attached. No flaws, defects, or signs of wear. Stored in archival conditions.
Free shipping on orders over $300 within the US. Worldwide shipping calculated at checkout. Returns accepted within 7 days for unworn items, original tags attached.
